meaning: Land 威尔克斯地[南极洲](在玛丽王后地同乔治五世地之间)
examples: Ashley Wilkes was elected as the captain, because he was the best rider in the county and because his cool head was counted on to keep some semblance of order.
Did John Wilkes live in vain?
In John Wilkes' barbecue, Twelve Oaks.
Spokesman James Keating-Wilkes said the situation would be reviewed in the event of a major incident.
Wilkes moves to London after two years with the Wildcats, following spells at Huddersfield and Wigan.
